document.title: Label and packaging specification for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

sourceSummary.oneLine: Slides specify CE/FCC/IC/CMIT label content for A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector and related accessories.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory label and packaging content for detector, sub label, exposure switch, switch box, shipment box, and transport symbol labeling.
keyPoints: Detector labels identify H&abyz Co., Ltd. as manufacturer and list A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW as Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models.
Detector labels show CE marking with number 2265, IP56, Made in Korea, rating 16V 3A, specified power supplies DEPS9601 or DEPS9601A, and SDB-3S1PA Li-ion battery use.
Sub label includes FCC part 15 compliance wording, FCC ID, IC, CMIT ID placeholder, Korean radio-interference warning, and R-CRM-SEC-WBW880A.
Switch Box label states use with A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW only and compliance with IEC 60601-1 and IEC 60601-1-2.
Shipment box label states ISO13485:2016 Certified Company and lists model names A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW.

reviewFlags.reason: Document date is not stated in the slide text; date-like strings appear only in the source path or file name.
Authority is ambiguous: source metadata indicates MFDS/domestic, while slide text contains CE, FCC, IC, CMIT, and Korean radio warning content.
Revision is taken from label text as Rev.0.0; the source file name contains rev7, which may refer to the presentation file rather than label revision.
CMIT ID value is not provided after the CMIT ID label in the extracted text.
